frame_analyses.description: Setup view showing the FLS trainer with Penrose drain positioned on the platform with visible marks
Instruments visible entering the field, beginning needle loading process
Right instrument grasping needle, preparing for suture placement
Needle being passed through first mark on the Penrose drain
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Precise needle placement through the drain tissue

frame_analyses.description: Suture being pulled through drain, preparing for second pass
Beginning formation of surgeon's knot (double throw) with right hand leading
Tightening the surgeon's knot double throw, appears secure
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good knot formation and tightening technique

frame_analyses.description: Creating second throw with left hand now leading, proper hand switching
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Excellent hand switching demonstrated for second throw

frame_analyses.description: Forming third throw with right hand leading again, switching from previous throw
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper hand switching maintained for third throw

frame_analyses.description: Using scissors to cut first suture end close to knot
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Appropriate cutting technique with good visualization

frame_analyses.description: Cutting second suture end to complete the task
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean cutting of both suture ends

frame_analyses.description: Task completed with knot secured and suture ends cut
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Final result shows secure knot with no visible gap in drain

knot_assessments.notes: Proper surgeon's knot (double throw) executed correctly
Single throw with proper hand switching from right to left
Final single throw with hand switching from left to right

drain_assessment.assessment_note: Drain slit appears well closed with secure knot placement

technique_summary: Excellent execution of intracorporeal suturing with proper surgeon's knot formation and consistent hand switching between throws. Clean and efficient performance.
improvement_suggestions: Consider slightly more precise suture placement to minimize deviation from marks
Continue practicing to maintain this excellent technique consistency
strengths: Perfect hand switching technique between all throws
Efficient timing and smooth instrument handling
Good knot security with complete drain closure
